assets.summary: Fix checkout money-calculation bugs by turning failing tests into rounding, boundary, and validation guardrails.
strategy: Run targeted tests before editing and keep failure output as evidence.
Identify monetary invariants: integer cents, non-negative totals, explicit rounding, and bounded percentages.
Patch the smallest function that violates the invariant.
Re-run tests and convert the lesson into a local skill only after validation passes.

assets.summary: Converted a failing checkout coupon calculation into a tested Decimal-based implementation and a payment edge-case review skill.

impact.before: 15% of 333 cents rounded down, over-100% coupons could produce negative totals, and negative inputs were accepted.
impact.after: Explicit half-up rounding, input validation, bounded coupons, passing tests, and a reusable local skill.
